page_metadata.biotools__summary: permGWAS is an open source software tool written in python to efficiently perform genome-wide association studies (GWAS) with permutation-based thresholds. permGWAS provides support for multiple CPUs as well as for GPUs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: permGWAS is an open source software tool written in python to efficiently perform genome-wide association studies (GWAS) with permutation-based thresholds. permGWAS provides support for multiple CPUs as well as for GPUs.
